description_long: This is a built-in kitchen cabinetry unit featuring a combination of upper and lower wooden cabinets, drawers, and a central countertop island with a sink. The cabinetry is arranged in an L-shape, with a white stove and oven integrated into the back wall, flanked by additional storage cabinets. The countertop surfaces are dark gray, likely made of laminate or stone, and the cabinetry doors and drawers have visible handles. There is a small enclosed pantry or utility closet with a white door and a small window above it. The overall structure is framed by light gray walls, creating a semi-enclosed kitchen workspace. The design is typical of modern urban apartments or homes, providing ample storage and functional surfaces for food preparation.
description: A built-in L-shaped kitchen cabinetry unit with wooden cabinets, drawers, a central island with a sink, and integrated appliances, framed by light gray walls.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white door to the pantry or utility closet and part of the countertop island.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the small window above the pantry and the back of the cabinetry structure.
description_view_2: Oblique view revealing the full kitchen layout, including the stove, oven, and extensive cabinetry along the back wall.
description_view_3: Frontal view of the kitchen cabinetry, showcasing the island with sink, stove, oven, and multiple cabinets and drawers.
